userStories.title: Add sprite configs for 12 new enemies
Add new behavior types to types.ts
Create 12 enemy config files and register in index
Implement deathCloud and gasSpreader behaviors
userStories.description:
In `src/systems/EnemyBehaviors.ts`, implement deathCloud (Koffing) and gasSpreader (Weezing).

Death Cloud Pool (similar to existing activeSpores pool):
Add module-level array near activeSpores:
  interface DeathCloud { x:number; y:number; radius:number; dps:number; endTime:number; circle:Phaser.GameObjects.Arc|null; }
  const activeClouds: DeathCloud[] = []; const MAX_CLOUDS = 20;

Export processDeathClouds(player, time, delta): iterate backwards, remove expired (destroy circle), for active: check dist to player, if within radius apply dps*(delta/1000) damage. VFX guard for circles.

Export spawnDeathCloud(scene, x, y, radius, dps, durationMs): if full remove oldest. Create circle (0x9944cc, alpha 0.3) with VFX guard. Push to array. Fade-out tween in last 1000ms.

deathCloud behavior: case 'deathCloud': break; — no special movement. Death cloud spawned from Enemy.die().

In Enemy.ts die() method, AFTER deathExplosion block: check if enemy has deathCloud config and call spawnDeathCloud. To access config, store deathCloud as property on Enemy class similar to deathExplosion. Add: readonly deathCloudConfig: {radius:number;dps:number;durationMs:number}|undefined. Set in constructor from config.deathCloud. In die(): if(this.deathCloudConfig){spawnDeathCloud(this.scene,this.x,this.y,cfg.radius,cfg.dps,cfg.durationMs);}

gasSpreader behavior: State key gs_nextDrop. Every 3000ms call spawnDeathCloud(scene, enemy.x, enemy.y, 30, 3, 3000). Move toward player normally. Death cloud from die() handled by deathCloud config.

Wire into SpawnSystem: import processDeathClouds, call after processSpores(player, time). Pass delta: processDeathClouds(player, time, delta).

userStories.title: Implement puller and pullerElite behaviors
Implement trapper and trapperElite behaviors
Implement rammer behavior
userStories.description:
In `src/systems/EnemyBehaviors.ts`, implement rammer behavior (Rhyhorn/Rhydon).

State machine 4 states (similar to charger but NO tracking during charge):

Constants: RAMMER_IDLE_SPEED_MULT=0.6, RAMMER_CHARGE_SPEED=250, RAMMER_CHARGE_SPEED_ELITE=300, RAMMER_AIM_DURATION=800, RAMMER_CHARGE_DURATION=1500, RAMMER_RECOVER_DURATION=1000, RAMMER_CYCLE=4000.

State keys: rm_state(0-3), rm_next, rm_angle, rm_stateEnd, rm_chargeCount.

State 0 (idle): Move toward player at speed*0.6. When time>=rm_next, go to state 1.
State 1 (aiming): Stop. Lock rm_angle to player. Tint 0xff8844. After AIM_DURATION, go to state 2.
State 2 (charging): Move in LOCKED angle at charge speed (NOT tracking player). Tint 0xff4400. After CHARGE_DURATION: if maxHp>200 AND chargeCount<2, re-aim (state 1 brief). Else state 3.
State 3 (recovering): Stop. clearTint. After RECOVER_DURATION, state 0, rm_next=time+CYCLE.

Double charge for Rhydon: maxHp>200 gets 2 charges before recover. Track with rm_chargeCount.

To detect elite: store rm_isElite = (enemy config hp > 200) at init. Access maxHp via (enemy as any).maxHp or enemy.getData('maxHp'). If unavailable, check enemy.hp > 200 on first update.

Add case to updateBehavior switch.

userStories.title: Implement slasher behavior
userStories.description:
In `src/systems/EnemyBehaviors.ts`, implement slasher behavior (Scyther). Hit-and-run.

Constants: SLASHER_ORBIT_DIST=150, SLASHER_CYCLE=3500, SLASHER_WINDUP=500, SLASHER_SLASH_DURATION=400, SLASHER_SLASH_SPEED=400, SLASHER_RETURN_DURATION=1500.

State keys: sl_state(0-3), sl_next, sl_angle, sl_stateEnd.

State 0 (orbiting): Maintain ~150px from player. If dist<120 move away, if dist>180 move toward, else perpendicular orbit. When time>=sl_next, state 1.
State 1 (winding): Stop. Lock sl_angle. Tint 0xff2222. After WINDUP, state 2.
State 2 (slashing): Dash in locked angle at SLASH_SPEED (goes THROUGH player). Tint 0xaaffaa. After SLASH_DURATION, state 3.
State 3 (returning): Move toward orbit distance. clearTint. After RETURN_DURATION, state 0, sl_next=time+CYCLE.

Orbit movement:
  if dist<120: move away
  else if dist>180: move toward
  else: perpendicular (body.velocity.x = -Math.sin(angle)*speed*0.8, body.velocity.y = Math.cos(angle)*speed*0.8)

Add case to updateBehavior switch.

userStories.title: Implement shielder behavior and shield system
Implement leaper and stunner behaviors
userStories.description:
In `src/systems/EnemyBehaviors.ts`, implement leaper (Hitmonlee) and stunner (Electabuzz).

leaper: Constants: LEAPER_STALK_DIST=220, LEAPER_CYCLE=4000, LEAPER_WINDUP=600, LEAPER_LEAP_SPEED=400, LEAPER_LEAP_DURATION=300, LEAPER_STUN_DURATION=2000, LEAPER_HIT_RANGE=35.
State keys: lp_state(0-4), lp_next, lp_targetX, lp_targetY, lp_stateEnd.
State 0 (stalking): Maintain ~220px dist. When time>=lp_next, state 1.
State 1 (windup): Stop. Crouch (scaleY*0.8). Tint 0xffcc00. Lock target=player pos. After WINDUP, restore scale, state 2.
State 2 (leaping): Move toward locked target at LEAP_SPEED. After LEAP_DURATION, state 3.
State 3 (landing): Check dist to player. If <HIT_RANGE: hit (contact damage natural), clearTint, state 0, lp_next=time+CYCLE. If >=HIT_RANGE: missed, state 4.
State 4 (stunned): Stop. Tint 0x888888. After STUN_DURATION, clearTint, state 0, lp_next=time+CYCLE.

stunner: STUNNER_RETREAT_DURATION=1500. State keys: st_retreating(bool), st_retreatEnd.
If retreating: move AWAY from player at 1.5x speed. When time>=st_retreatEnd, stop retreating.
If not retreating: move toward player at full speed. If dist<20 (contact made): set retreating=true, st_retreatEnd=time+DURATION, tint 0xffff44.

Add both cases to updateBehavior switch.

userStories.title: Add new enemies to Phase 3 waves
userStories.description:
Edit `src/data/enemies/phases/phase3.ts` to add 4 new enemies (koffing, magnemite, tentacool, rhyhorn) to wave configs.

Phase 3 has 20 waves. Add gradually:
- Waves 40-43: Add koffing(weight 1), magnemite(weight 1) to existing arrays
- Waves 44-47: Add tentacool(weight 1)
- Waves 48-51: Add rhyhorn(weight 1). All 4 present.
- Waves 52-55: Increase new enemy weights to 2
- Waves 56-59: All 4 at weight 2-3

Do NOT remove existing enemies. Just append new entries to the enemies arrays.
Update header comment to mention new enemies.

userStories.title: Add new enemies to Phase 4 waves
userStories.description:
Edit `src/data/enemies/phases/phase4.ts` to add 8 new enemies (weezing, magneton, tentacruel, rhydon, scyther, mr-mime, hitmonlee, electabuzz) to wave configs.

Phase 4 has 20 waves. Currently only Alakazam and Electrode as new enemies.
- Waves 60-63: Add weezing(1), magneton(1)
- Waves 64-67: Add tentacruel(1), rhydon(1), scyther(1)
- Waves 68-71: Add mr-mime(1), hitmonlee(1)
- Waves 72-75: Add electabuzz(1). All 8 present. Weights to 2.
- Waves 76-79: Full roster weight 2-3. Reduce legacy P3 enemies.

Keep Alakazam and Electrode weights. Use type names: 'mr-mime' (hyphenated).
Update header comment.
